cards.title: Create a Parenting Rota That Works
cards.body: A couple solved constant bickering about household duties by implementing a simple parenting schedule system. The rota dramatically reduced conflict after their second child was born and life became overwhelming.

cards.title: Navigating In-Law Relationships Before Kids
cards.body: An advice column addresses concerns about a partner's harsh mother and her future involvement with children. The expert recommends minimizing contact unless the relationship dynamics change significantly.

cards.title: Raising Resilient Adolescent Girls Online
cards.body: Parenting teenage girls in today's digital culture requires updated strategies, though some fundamental rules remain unchanged. Expert guidance offers practical suggestions for navigating modern challenges.

cards.title: Bridging Cultural Gaps in Immigrant Families
cards.body: Children of immigrant families often adapt to new cultures faster than their parents, creating tension. Empathy, shared language, and storytelling can help bridge these developmental divides.

cards.title: Understanding Parental Enmeshment in Families
cards.body: Not all parent-child attachment is healthy; unhealthy dependence can harm development. Learning to recognize signs of enmeshment is the first step to breaking these bonds.

cards.title: Child Neglect Has Severe Psychological Effects
cards.body: Research shows child neglect can cause greater depression severity than physical or sexual abuse. Understanding this impact is crucial for recognizing and addressing developmental trauma.

cards.title: When Child Behavior Signals Emotional Need
cards.body: Difficult behaviors often cry out for emotional recognition and safety rather than punishment. Understanding this connection transforms how parents respond to challenging conduct.

cards.title: Help Teen Girls Achieve Without Burning Out
cards.body: High-achieving daughters face mental health risks from pressure to excel. Families can implement practical home strategies to protect wellbeing while supporting ambitious goals.

cards.title: AI's Effect on Children Forming Identity
cards.body: AI's illusion of knowing you feels harmless for adults but carries real risks for children still developing identity. Understanding this psychological phenomenon helps parents guide tech use.
